title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Airtel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Airtel India family as a Backend Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Airtel India:
Airtel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India!
